answer: **Herb Collection at Darkgrove** — You're sitting at 332 nettle and 322 thistle. One decent foraging session gets you to the 500-tier threshold for both. Herb achievements give flat AP chunks per tier (100 → 250 → 500) with no RNG involved. After you clear those, your agility milestones at 3.8M XP are the next cheapest AP payout.
